zh.title: 艾达币/美元技术分析：弱势震荡整理格局
zh.content:
现价0.1514，短线走势偏弱震荡，K线运行贴近区间下沿，整体维持窄幅整理，多空暂未形成明确突破方向。

MACD柱值持续为负且动能略有放大，显示空头动能占优；SMA20位于0.15176上方，价格轻微跌破均线，短期均线压制明显，反弹力度有限。

下方关键支撑关注0.151整数关口及前低区域，一旦失守或加速下探；上方阻力位于0.1525及0.153附近，突破需放量配合，否则易受压回落。

操作上建议以区间交易为主，激进者可在支撑附近轻仓博反弹，稳健者等待放量突破均线后再顺势跟进，控制仓位并设置严格止损以防假突破。

en.title: Cardano vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Cardano (ADA/USD) continues to trade in a tight consolidation range with a mild bearish tilt, reflecting limited directional conviction among market participants. Price remains compressed between the intraday low near 0.1510 and high around 0.1525, suggesting equilibrium after recent selling pressure. The inability to sustain moves above short-term averages indicates fragile momentum, with sellers slightly dominating short-term price action and limiting any meaningful upside continuation.

Technical indicators reinforce this cautious outlook. The MACD reading remains negative at -0.000867, signaling persistent bearish momentum and a lack of bullish divergence to suggest reversal strength. The 20-period SMA at 0.15176 sits marginally above current price, acting as dynamic resistance. With RSI unavailable, momentum confirmation is incomplete; however, positioning below the SMA indicates weak recovery attempts and a continued bias toward sideways-to-lower movement.

Immediate support is located at 0.1510, with a deeper psychological level near 0.1500 that could attract buyers if tested. On the upside, resistance is defined at 0.15176 (SMA20) followed by 0.1525, the recent intraday high. A sustained breakout above 0.1525 would be required to shift structure toward short-term bullish recovery, while a breakdown below 0.1510 could accelerate downside pressure.

Trading conditions favor patience and disciplined range strategies in the current low-volatility environment. Short-term traders may look for long entries near 0.1510 with tight risk controls below 0.1500, targeting mean reversion toward 0.1525. Alternatively, a breakout above the SMA20 could validate renewed upside momentum. Until clearer direction emerges, strict risk management remains essential.
